titleStmt.title: SII 6.622: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 622. (A.R. No. 177 of 1899). ON ANOTHER PILLAR IN THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī . śakavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1170 . A
gunēṁṭṭi Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkrāṁttinimittamuna
śrīmanmahāpradhāni ga
jasāhaṇi bhāskaradē
vaṁḍū lakkarājūnu
tama taṁḍri cāmirā
junakū tama talli A
nnesānikinni puṇyamu
gā niccina vrittulu ko
ṭṭiyadonanu prōlesō
mayājulaku kha 1 ma 1
Agnipeddiṁgāriki kha 1 ma 1
Ā madhuvanapeddi kha 1 ma 1The last two letters are entered below the line.
prēkēṭi vāmarāju
verisa kha 1 na 10 . ma 1
Ā kēśavappana kha 1 na 10
vīrivaricē ma 1 Ā
nārāyaṇamaṁcci kha 1 na 10
varima 1 jōsyalu
diki kha 2 ma 2 śrīdha
ju kha 1 ma 1 ballebageṟa
nnamarāju kha 2 ma 2
ṛṟeḍla nūṁkanapeddi kha 2 ma
namaṁcci kha 2 ma 2
sūreAppanaku kha 2 ma 2The last two letters areA
rēśvaruni kha 2 ma 2
ṟapōtarāju kha 1 na 1
ṁccennemaṁcci na 10 A
rājumallipeddi kha 1
na kha 1 sūrekūci kha ma 1The last two letters are entered above the line.
ccennemaṁcci kha 1 ma 1The last two letters are entereddēva
ju kha 2 ma 2 lakṣmīdha
Appana kha 3 ma 3 Elle
cci kha 2 ma 2 sūra
kha 1 ma 1 kēsavuni kha
kaṁddappaṁḍu
From this line onwards the inscription is engraved at the top of the pillar.
ṟuvenaka
ṁgāriki ma 2
ṁcirāju kha 1 ma 1
ḍiceṟlanallapiḷa

siddaparāju kha 1
ma 1
prōlamarājuṁgārkikha 2 A
ricēnu ma 1 gannaya kha 1
ma 1 kūcirāju kha 2 ma 1
kāmaya kha 2 ma 1 mā
reAppana kha 3 ma 1 Ā peru
māṁḍi ma 1 goṭṭināthaA
ppaya kha 2 ma 2 pinnakūci
kha 1 ma 1 siṁggaperumāḍi
kha 2 ma 2 nallaviḷa kha 2 ma 2
perumāpiḷa kha 2 ma 2 kā
ḷāṁbika kha 2 ma 2 mārepe
ddi kha 1 ma 1 bhīmanapeddi kha 2
ma 2 nāggarāju kha 1 ma 1The syllables ma 1 are entered below the line.
kommanapeddi kha 1 ma 1 kommakū
ci kha 1 ma 2 Ekkaya kha 2
ma 2 bayyanappana kha 1The passage from daṁ to ma 1 is entered below the line.daṁṇāyaka kha 1 ma 1
koppanapegaḍa bhāskaruni
ki kha 1 ma 1 . calivaṁdiri
pōtarājunakū Ā gaṁgga
rājunakū kha 3 ma 2 satte
napalli kommanamaṁcci kha 2 ma 1
nāre(ṁ)pa kha ma 1
rāmarāju kha 2 na 17 maThe syllables ma 2 are entered below the line.2 maddi
cerlaprōlidēvani kha 2 ma 2
sūreAppanaka na 10 Anna
pemmayaku kha 2 nūkāṁḍimāra
vōtipeddi kha 2 ma 1
nāguvāyaki kha 1 ma 1
pōccirājunaku kha 2 ma 1
Īśāsanānaṁgala mahājanula
darucēnaku kha 2 nūkaṁḍi ma 2
ku guṁḍlaceṟuvu vritigā ni
ccitimi Iṁddu vrāsina martu
leṁbadiṁ paṁccikoni tamalō
sukha manubhaviṁccuvāru .
cikumāranu goṭṭipāṭi Appeṁ
gāriki kha 2 perumāṁḍipeddi
ki kha 1 Aṁdekommanappanaku
kha 1 guṁḍlaceṟuvuna brā
(ṁ)hmalalōna vīrikē ma 1
kēśa dāsulaku kha 1 ma 1
nūṁkāṁḍi ceṟvuvenaka bī
manapediki ma 2 nārikū
ci kha 1 ma 1 ma 1

prōlepedi kha 1 ma 1 Annepu
luyasāniki kha 2 ma 2
guṁḍḍamarājunaku kha 2 ma
2 nūṁkāṁḍi ceṟuvenaka
māreAppana ma 1 perumāḍi
peddi ma 1 lmadharappa ma 2 jō
śya Ānnipeddi ma 2 pinnekūci
ma 1 vāmarājuṁgāriki ma
3 goṭṭipāṭi Appaya ma 1
kāṭaya ma 1 bhūnācirā
ju kha 1 ma 1 pōcirāju
malna kha 1 ma 1 bra(ṁ)hmē
śvaradēvaraku kha 2 gūṁṭṭa
bhaṁḍḍi Appekha 1 ma 1 śrī
maddiṟēvula dēvataku
kha 1 sarvvarāju kha 1 ma 1 lakma
rāju kha 1 ma 1 paṁṭṭamai
lārapeddiki kha 1
ma 1
pillalamaṟṟi bhāskarakū
ciki kha 1 nūṁkāṁḍice
ṟuvuna ma 1 pedapōtasō
mayājiki kha 1 ma 1
peddanapūṁḍi Apeku kha
peguṁbāṭi māramarā
ju ko rājunaku
kū ki peguṁbāṭape
rana 10 kha 3 Aṁddē
peddi kha 2 ma 2 pōdelikiṭṭama

ceṟna ma 3 velicenu
kha 4 krāmarāju kha 1 ma 1ma 1 is entered below the line.
© Āyittamaṁciṁgā
riki kha 2 ma 2 vīrikē
ciṁttalaceṟuvu
venakanu ma 2 gō
viṁdapediki kha 2 ma 2 nuṁkāṁḍi
ceṟuvana na 1 .
Digital edition of SII 6.622 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
